mapper.select: SELECT id, name, slug, sort, created_at, updated_at FROM help_category ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, category_id, title, slug, content_md, content_html, tags, views, up_votes, down_votes, published, created_at, updated_at FROM help_article
(title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR content_md LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{tag}, tags)
AND published = 1
ORDER BY up_votes - down_votes DESC, views DESC, updated_at DESC ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT id, category_id, title, slug, content_md, content_html, tags, views, up_votes, down_votes, published, created_at, updated_at FROM help_article WHERE slug = #{slug} AND published = 1
SELECT id, category_id, title, slug, content_md, content_html, tags, views, up_votes, down_votes, published, created_at, updated_at FROM help_article WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE help_article SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO help_article_feedback (article_id, user_id, helpful, content, created_at) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{helpful}, #{content}, NOW())

INSERT INTO help_ticket ( user_id, title, description, channel, ticket_type, priority, source_role, contact, is_anonymous, status, assignee_admin_id, last_reply_at, closed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{channel}, #{ticketType}, #{priority}, #{sourceRole}, #{contact}, #{anonymous}, #{status}, #{assigneeAdminId}, #{lastReplyAt}, #{closedAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT ht.id, ht.user_id, ht.title, ht.description, ht.channel, ht.ticket_type, ht.priority, ht.source_role, ht.contact, ht.is_anonymous, ht.status, ht.assignee_admin_id, ht.last_reply_at, ht.closed_at, ht.created_at, ht.updated_at, u.username AS username, u.role AS user_role, admin_user.username AS assignee_name FROM help_ticket ht LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ht.user_id LEFT JOIN users admin_user ON admin_user.id = ht.assignee_admin_id WHERE ht.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ht.updated_at DESC, ht.created_at DESC

SELECT ht.id, ht.user_id, ht.title, ht.description, ht.channel, ht.ticket_type, ht.priority, ht.source_role, ht.contact, ht.is_anonymous, ht.status, ht.assignee_admin_id, ht.last_reply_at, ht.closed_at, ht.created_at, ht.updated_at, u.username AS username, u.role AS user_role, admin_user.username AS assignee_name FROM help_ticket ht LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ht.user_id LEFT JOIN users admin_user ON admin_user.id = ht.assignee_admin_id WHERE ht.id = #{id} AND ht.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT ht.id, ht.user_id, ht.title, ht.description, ht.channel, ht.ticket_type, ht.priority, ht.source_role, ht.contact, ht.is_anonymous, ht.status, ht.assignee_admin_id, ht.last_reply_at, ht.closed_at, ht.created_at, ht.updated_at, u.username AS username, u.role AS user_role, admin_user.username AS assignee_name FROM help_ticket ht LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ht.user_id LEFT JOIN users admin_user ON admin_user.id = ht.assignee_admin_id WHERE ht.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO help_ticket_message (ticket_id, sender_id, sender_role, sender_side, content, created_at) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{senderId}, #{senderRole}, #{senderSide}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT htm.id, htm.ticket_id, htm.sender_id, htm.sender_role, htm.sender_side, htm.content, htm.created_at, u.username AS sender_name FROM help_ticket_message htm LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = htm.sender_id WHERE htm.ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY htm.created_at ASC, htm.id ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM help_ticket WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
